word: H8521 - תֵּל חַרְשָׁא - Têl Charshâʼ - tale khar-shaw' - Tel-haresha

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּל חרשׁא

Transliteration: têl charshâ'

Phonetic: tale khar-shaw'

BDB Definition:

Tel-harsa or Tel-haresha = "mound of the deaf mute"
  1. a town of Babylon
    1. probably located in the low country near the sea

Origin: from H8510 and the fem. of H2798

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
